2604.11547.title: Eliciting Medical Reasoning with Knowledge-enhanced Data Synthesis: A Semi-Supervised Reinforcement Learning Approach
2604.11547.paper_summary: While large language models hold promise for complex medical applications, their development is hindered by the scarcity of high-quality reasoning data. To address this issue, existing approaches typically distill chain-of-thought reasoning traces from large proprietary models via supervised fine-tuning, then conduct reinforcement learning (RL). These methods exhibit limited improvement on underrepresented domains like rare diseases while incurring substantial costs from generating complex reasoning chains. To efficiently enhance medical reasoning, we propose MedSSR, a Medical Knowledge-enhanced data Synthesis and Semi-supervised Reinforcement learning framework. Our framework first employs rare disease knowledge to synthesize distribution-controllable reasoning questions. We then utilize the policy model itself to generate high-quality pseudo-labels. This enables a two-stage, intrinsic-to-extrinsic training paradigm: self-supervised RL on the pseudo-labeled synthetic data, followed by supervised RL on the human-annotated real data. MedSSR scales model training efficiently without relying on costly trace distillation. Extensive experiments on Qwen and Llama demonstrate that our method outperforms existing methods across ten medical benchmarks, achieving up to +5.93% gain on rare-disease tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/tdlhl/MedSSR.
2604.11547.paper_summary_zh: 雖然大型語言模型在複雜的醫療應用中展現出潛力，但其發展受到高品質推理數據稀缺的阻礙。為了解決這個問題，現有的方法通常通過監督微調從大型專有模型中提取思考鏈推理痕跡，然後進行強化學習（RL）。這些方法在稀有疾病等代表性不足的領域上改進有限，同時在生成複雜推理鏈時產生了可觀的成本。為了有效提升醫療推理，我們提出了MedSSR，一個增強醫療知識的數據合成和半監督強化學習框架。我們的框架首先利用稀有疾病知識合成可控分佈的推理問題。然後，我們利用策略模型本身生成高品質的偽標籤。這使得一個兩階段的內部到外部的訓練範式成為可能：在偽標記的合成數據上進行自監督RL，然後在人工標註的真實數據上進行監督RL。MedSSR有效地擴展模型訓練，而無需依賴昂貴的痕跡提煉。在Qwen和Llama上的大量實驗表明，我們的方法在十個醫療基準測試中超越了現有方法，在稀有疾病任務上達到了高達+5.93%的增益。我們的代碼可在https://github.com/tdlhl/MedSSR獲得。
2604.11547.author: Haolin Li et.al.
2604.11547.authors: Haolin Li, Shuyang Jiang, Ruipeng Zhang, Jiangchao Yao, Ya Zhang, Yanfeng Wang
